metrics.command_line: export PYTHON_EGG_CACHE=`pwd` &&   (macs2 callpeak   -t '/galaxy/server/database/objects/5/a/f/dataset_5af1ec04-880b-4294-b934-6043dbbcfa5e.dat'  --name forward_and_reverse    --format BAMPE   --gsize '2913022398'      --SPMR     --call-summits  --keep-dup '1'  --d-min 20 --buffer-size 100000  --bdg  --qvalue '0.05'  --mfold '5' '50'  --bw '300'  2>&1 > macs2_stderr) && cp forward_and_reverse_peaks.xls '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/329/outputs/dataset_6181ddba-23e2-45fa-8a02-3686072784e5.dat'   && ( count=`ls -1 forward_and_reverse* 2>/dev/null | wc -l`; if [ $count != 0 ]; then mkdir '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/329/outputs/dataset_3422fadf-860e-4418-9fbc-d6c688067f49_files' && cp -r forward_and_reverse* '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/329/outputs/dataset_3422fadf-860e-4418-9fbc-d6c688067f49_files' && python '/cvmfs/cloud.galaxyproject.org/tools/toolshed.g2.bx.psu.edu/repos/iuc/macs2/86e2413cf3f8/macs2/dir2html.py' '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/329/outputs/dataset_3422fadf-860e-4418-9fbc-d6c688067f49_files' macs2_stderr > '/galaxy/server/database/jobs_directory/000/329/outputs/dataset_3422fadf-860e-4418-9fbc-d6c688067f49.dat'; fi; ) && exit_code_for_galaxy=$? && cat macs2_stderr 2>&1 && (exit $exit_code_for_galaxy)
